Post Comment
No Grind, No Problem
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2023 at 3:03 PM Rating: Decent
FyfulLaughinghammer
3 posts
Of the four swords to get, this is the most annoying.

I tried doing all the kill rotation mumbojumbo, but what ended up working for me was, parking my ranger in the zone and checking track every 30 minutes or so. Parked the ranger at Megan's tower. This was the least frustrating way to obtaining it.
▲ Page top
GZ finally
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2015 at 9:00 AM Rating: Decent
gryphon403
9 posts
It took 13 kills, but he finally dropped it.

From my original post, these are the mobs on his spawn cycle.

ice goblin whelp
an ice goblin scout
a polar bear cub
a snow leopard
a wooly mammoth calf
a polar bear
an orcish mountaineer
a large wooly spider
a snow orc trooper

The only one that seems unique to Karg is the polar bear cub. If you get "ice goblin whelp" you know you're either on his spawn cycle or Martar's. If Martar spawns, just leave him up. As far as the tracking issues, I found that if I went back to permafront entrance, sometimes the double, triple mobs that showed up on track about the same time resolved down to one. All of Karg's placeholders spawn between perma and Megan's tower, with a couple of spawn points out on the ridge just in front of the tower.

Don't expect it to be easy or quick. I've followed this line of kills for an hour with no luck on Karg and followed it for 5 minutes to spawn him. He's either a very rare part of it or has a lock out timer that says something, 1 Karg every x number of hours. Usually if I run the spawns for 20 or 30 minutes with no luck, I give up and come back several hours later.

Good luck.
▲ Page top
ice goblin whelp - part 2
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2015 at 8:45 AM Rating: Decent
gryphon403
9 posts
Ok, an update. The "ice goblin whelp" is on both Karg and Martar's kill lines. I spawned both characters this morning after server update and have a screenshot with both on track.

11 Karg kils, no GZ. :(
▲ Page top
ice goblin whelp leads to Karg
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2015 at 8:15 AM Rating: Decent
gryphon403
9 posts
Message has high abuse count and will not be displayed.
▲ Page top
Addendum to Karg Part 2
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2015 at 2:33 PM Rating: Decent
gryphon403
9 posts
First, "ice goblin whelp" is not on the bestiary, but I killed it numerous times today. Second, what clued me in to maybe this is different is the Frontier Mts goblin loop. In the southeast, one of the place holders is "a goblin raider" instead of the normal "goblin raider".

I read somewhere that Karg was supposedly an 8 hour spawn. I'll try this same method later to see if it pays off again.
▲ Page top
Karg part 2
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2015 at 2:25 PM Rating: Decent
gryphon403
9 posts
Okay, I did find something. I went out today and decided to kill the types of mobs I thought had a link to Karg, namely the small stuff, polar bear cubs, ice goblin whelps and the like. That's where I noticed something different. On one of these kill lines, ice goblin whelp spawned, not an ice goblin whelp, just ice goblin whelp. So I killed it and followed it's line.

Mostly, they ran me back and forth between about 5 different spawn points. After about 5 minutes, Karg popped. I tried following that same line again and did for a while, but there's so much popping and re-popping on the tundra that I eventually lost it. I mean, when you have 3 mobs pop within a second of each other, which is yours?

Now, there are a ton of "an ice goblin whelp" mobs on the tundra, but that's the only ice goblin whelp I saw. I was able to confirm that if I kept the kill line straight, it spawned on that line of mobs.

The frustrating part about it is, Karg could be on that kill line, but also simply have a lock-out timer, meaning if you get it right and the timer has elapsed, there's a chance of him spawning. If not, you end up chasing the same mobs round and round - which is very hard out there since things are spawning all the time.
▲ Page top
Recent Karg search
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2015 at 1:45 PM Rating: Decent
gryphon403
9 posts
I've been plopping a druid in Everfrost Peaks for a couple of weeks now. 6 karg kills and 0 zwiehanders.

But this is what I've noticed. There's a dead spot just in front of the platform where Redwind and the icy orcs spawn. I can spawn Martar by killing the mobs that cross in front of that platform. Now, the spawn rate is about 10 seconds. You kill one of those mobs, and you'll see its replacement pop back up within about 10 seconds. I noticed that because occasionally, Martar will respawn right after you kill him. In fact, I've seen him respawn 3 times in a row, the last time with two of his corpses scattered across the tundra.

So, what's that got to do with Karg? Well, I noticed on several of the Karg spawns, I'd just killed one of the mobs walking that same path. On my last Karg kill, I watched track and confirmed that a new mob popped up approximately 10 seconds after I killed him .I went around for a few minutes only killing the spawns off that cycle, but didn't have time to follow it through to see if I could eventually spawn Karg again.

One thing I did notice. His spawns included some of the lower end mobs in the zone, like an ice goblin whelp and a polar bear cub - the only whelp or cub out near the entrance to Perma.

So, maybe there is a cycle here. I'm determined to get my GZ. If I figure it out, I'll post an update.
▲ Page top

ya same for me. took 3 weeks for him to pop tho ad not seenthe lower lev girl yet

GZ still dropping as of today
QuoteReply

1 post
Just killed karg icebear or what ever his name is in EF and he dropped 2 x GZ's and the cloak of the icebear and a lightstone! so yeah if anyone is wondering he still drops this a decade later heh.
▲ Page top
tradeskill
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2007 at 1:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592307322724
4 posts
It's used to make a "Worked Zweihander" by blacksmiths to make Deity specific weapons. The smithing combines can only be made by Trolls though.

Fearful Balanced Zweihander(Cazic-Thule):
MAGIC ITEM
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 34
STR: +10 STA: +5 HP: +50 Endurance: +20
Recommended level of 45
WT: 3.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Deity: Cazic Thule
Slot type 4:empty

Hateful Balanced Zweihander(Innoruuk):
MAGIC ITEM
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 34
STA: +5 HP: +50 MANA: +50 Endurance: +50
Recommended level of 45
WT: 3.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD BER
Race: ALL
Deity: Innoruuk
Slot type 4:empty

Vengeful Balanced Zweihander(Rallos Zek):
MAGIC ITEM
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 34 AC: 10
STA: +5 HP: +50
Recommended level of 45
WT: 3.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Deity: Rallos Zek
Slot type 4:empty

▲ Page top
RE: IS THIS STILL DROPPED
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2002 at 9:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249468029
5 posts
Yes, it still drops. I ran into Karg this morning while running from Permafrost. I asked him politely if he would mind me wearing his cloak for a while, and he seemed to have no problem with that. In fact he offered me his Zweihander, a fine steel 2-hander and a greater lightstone as well. I thanked him for his generosity and continued on my way.
▲ Page top
RE: IS THIS STILL DROPPED

Yes, it is still dropped. I got one yesterday, 1/24 for bringing down Karg Icebear. Got it along with Cloak of The Ice Bear, so it wasn't a bad haul for a yellow con. :)

Zweihander! Mein Fave!
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 12:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758030847
3 posts
Hehe... I got my GZ at level 9. I wasn't very dangerous w/it, but I do love it. I used it up to lev 23 and then got a BABS (which I also like)which is a better all around weapon. The question I have is 'how many are out there'? I can't find ANYONE on Cazic Thule server that knows anything about or owns one. I don't use it much anymore...but I hate to let go of it! Any experience Gigantic Zweihander Swingers out there?? :)

Is the Icebear the only mob that drops it ? i really want to know b/c i will get my butt kicked by him then.
▲ Page top
sword
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 4:31 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got onee find it to be a good weapon for a lvl 15 I had the axe of the iron back and found that it hits really slower than the sword. I do not know if it is just me but I find that the sword allows double attack before I even get it. When I was using the axe it hit then enmie hit then i hit again.....well sometime with the sword i hit, anemy, then I hit twice don't know why but it happens. I do not have double attack don't get it for awhile so could someone explain this to me?
▲ Page top
RE: sword
QuoteReply
# Jun 03 2001 at 1:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756913916
200 posts
What that means is that your weapon is faster than whatever you were hitting. Think of the delay as a clock cycle. The lower the delay number, the faster the clock hits 0 again. Sometimes you will hit 0 twice in between the time it takes your target to go from Start to Restart or whatever.

Hope that helps you...
▲ Page top
